revision.comment: Created page with "When I started my journey I needed a goshuin. So I shopped for them [[File:Hoshida Myokengu Goshuin-cho.jpg]] And so I decided this was the one [[File:Emma H. Leonhart's Goshuinchō 01.jpg]] [[File:Emma H. Leonhart's Goshuinchō 46.jpg]] And here we start from it"
revision.text:
When I started my journey I needed a goshuin. So I shopped for them
[[File:Hoshida Myokengu Goshuin-cho.jpg]]
And so I decided this was the one
[[File:Emma H. Leonhart's Goshuinchō 01.jpg]] [[File:Emma H. Leonhart's Goshuinchō 46.jpg]]
And here we start from it

When I started my journey I needed a goshuin. So I shopped for them
[[File:Hoshida Myokengu Goshuin-cho.jpg|thumb]]
And so I decided this was the one
[[File:Emma H. Leonhart's Goshuinchō 01.jpg|thumb]] [[File:Emma H. Leonhart's Goshuinchō 46.jpg|thumb]]
And here we start from it

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Immanuelle%2Fbook here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Immanuelle%2Fbook for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24796114356|commit triggered pipeline]] --> When I started my journey I needed a goshuin. So I shopped for them
[[File:Hoshida Myokengu Goshuin-cho.jpg|thumb]]
And so I decided this was the one
[[File:Emma H. Leonhart's Goshuinchō 01.jpg|thumb]] [[File:Emma H. Leonhart's Goshuinchō 46.jpg|thumb]]
And here we start from it
